brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid norm-violation reasoning; Multi-level analysis covering joint causation structure, norm violation asymmetry, and folk causation research; Some self-monitoring via suppressing framing biases but no explicit bias-checking of own reasoning; Mentions verification concepts but doesn't test alternative conclusions; Acknowledges the symmetric causal structure before explaining why folk judgment diverges; Considers the joint-cause alternative framing but could explore more systematically; Full derivation chain from causal structure to norm violation to folk judgment is traceable
